= Release Notes =

For the latest DreamFactory release notes, see the [https://github.com/dreamfactorysoftware/dreamfactory/releases DreamFactory GitHub Releases] page.

== Related Pages ==

* [[Upgrading_Migrating_Dreamfactory|Upgrading and Migrating DreamFactory]]
* [[Upgrading_Php_Windows|Upgrading PHP on Windows]]
* [[Upgrading_Php|Upgrading PHP]]

[[Category:Navigation]]
